title: Quantum Analytics Platform
description: A high-performance real-time data engine that processes 10M+ events per second. Built using Next.js, Rust-WASM, and TimescaleDB.

title: Decentralized Credit Network
description: A secure p2p borrowing protocol allowing users to secure collateralized loans using algorithmic risk pools.

title: Automated Deployment Pipeline
description: An open-source serverless platform facilitating isolated previews for monolithic microservice backends.
